sessions: Run the full test suite with 'python -m pytest tests/ -q' and fix whatever stops it from running. Do not commit anything.
Find where the CLI decides that an option is required, and add a short comment above that code explaining the rule in your own words.
Report how many test files are in tests/ and which one is largest. Do not change any code.
Discard all uncommitted changes with 'git checkout -- .', then run the full suite with 'python -m pytest tests/ -q' and make it pass again.
